code: import API from"./api";export const updateProfile=async profileData=>{const response=await API.put("/profile",profileData);return response.data;};export const changePassword=async passwordData=>{const response=await API.put("/profile/password",passwordData);return response.data;};export const uploadAvatar=async formData=>{const response=await API.post("/profile/avatar",formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});return response.data;};export const deleteAccount=async()=>{const response=await API.delete("/profile");return response.data;};
